resources.string: SafiStep monitors STK payment prompts to detect and block payments to flagged betting platforms. No financial data is stored or transmitted.
SafiStep watches over every M-Pesa STK payment and alerts you before money reaches a betting platform.
Our live blacklist of Kenyan betting platforms updates automatically. SafiStep catches new platforms as they are added.
When a suspicious payment is detected, you choose — block it or proceed. No payment is ever stopped without your awareness.
This payment appears to be going to a flagged betting platform.
